data.title: Falcon Gold Advances Drilling at Great Burnt Project
data.description:
An update from Falcon Gold ( (TSE:FG) ) is now available.

Falcon Gold Corp. has completed its third and fourth drill holes at the Great Burnt Copper-Gold Project and is preparing for a fifth, targeting a high-priority anomaly. The recent drilling has shown increased sulphide mineralization, suggesting a significant expansion of the mineralized system, which could enhance the project’s potential as a major copper-gold asset.

More about Falcon Gold

Falcon Gold Corp. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of copper and gold projects. The company is actively engaged in the Great Burnt Copper-Gold Project in Newfoundland, aiming to expand its mineralized systems and enhance its market position in the copper and gold sectors.

YTD Price Performance: 75.00%

Average Trading Volume: 141,612

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$6.21M

data.title: Creative Global Technology Announces Leadership Changes
data.description:
Creative Global Technology Holdings Limited ( (CGTL) ) has issued an update.

On March 27, 2025, Creative Global Technology Holdings Limited announced significant changes in its executive leadership. Shangzhao (‘Cizar’) Hong resigned as CEO and Chairman of the Board for personal reasons, with no disagreements with the company. Hei Tung (‘Angel’) Siu, previously the Chief Operations Officer, was appointed as the new CEO and Chairman. Additionally, Jia Yun Hong was appointed as the Chief Operations Officer and a director of the Board. These changes are expected to impact the company’s operations and potentially influence its market positioning in the pre-owned electronics industry.

More about Creative Global Technology Holdings Limited

Creative Global Technology Holdings Limited operates in the pre-owned consumer electronic devices recycling industry. The company focuses on procurement and warehouse operations, providing services related to the recycling and resale of pre-owned electronics.

YTD Price Performance: -46.54%

Average Trading Volume: 37,541

data.title: Inoc, S.A. Announces Voluntary Public Offer for Grupo Catalana Occidente Shares
data.description:
Grupo Catalana Occidente ( (ES:GCO) ) has shared an update.

Inoc, S.A. has announced a voluntary public offer for the acquisition of all shares of Grupo Catalana Occidente, subject to authorization by the National Securities Market Commission. This move could potentially impact Grupo Catalana Occidente’s market positioning and shareholder dynamics, as the offer involves a capital increase and share consideration modality.

More about Grupo Catalana Occidente

Grupo Catalana Occidente operates in the insurance industry, focusing on providing insurance services and managing an investment portfolio. It is part of the larger Grupo CO, which is involved in directing and managing participations in companies primarily dedicated to insurance activities.

data.title: Imagine Lithium Completes $2.35 Million Private Placement, Strengthening Exploration Efforts
data.description:
Imagine Lithium Inc ( (TSE:ILI) ) has shared an announcement.

Imagine Lithium Inc. has successfully closed the final tranche of its $2.35 million private placement, with funds allocated for corporate purposes and exploration at the Jackpot Lithium Project. The completion of this tranche has made Interway International LLC a significant shareholder, owning 19.88% of the company’s shares, which could influence Imagine Lithium’s strategic direction and shareholder value.

More about Imagine Lithium Inc

Imagine Lithium Inc. operates in the mining industry, focusing on lithium exploration and development. The company’s primary project is the Jackpot Lithium Project located in Ontario, Canada, which benefits from proximity to infrastructure such as highways and the port of Thunder Bay.

data.title: Green Oleo S.P.A. Achieves Robust Growth in 2024 Amidst Challenging Market Conditions
data.description:
Green Oleo S.P.A. ( (IT:GRN) ) has provided an announcement.

Green Oleo S.P.A. reported significant growth in 2024, with a 24% increase in volumes and an 18% rise in revenues, despite challenging macroeconomic conditions. The company achieved a 94% increase in EBITDA, driven by a strategic focus on esters and fatty acids, improved margins, and reduced raw material costs, positioning itself strongly in the oleochemical industry.

More about Green Oleo S.P.A.

Green Oleo S.P.A. is a leading European producer of fine oleochemicals from renewable and biodegradable sources, listed on Euronext Growth Milan. The company focuses on producing esters, fatty acids, and glycerines, with a strategic emphasis on downstream integration and high-value application areas.

data.title: Convergenze Reports Record Financial Growth and Enters Mobile Market
data.description:
Convergenze SpA Societa Benefit ( (IT:CVG) ) has provided an update.

Convergenze S.p.A. Società Benefit reported a record net result of €1.3 million for 2024, a 145% increase from the previous year, driven by strong growth in both telecommunications and energy sectors. The company also announced its entry into the mobile telephony market as a Mobile Virtual Network Operator, enhancing its position as an integrated technology operator and signaling continued investment in innovative and sustainable solutions.

More about Convergenze SpA Societa Benefit

Convergenze S.p.A. Società Benefit is an integrated technology operator active in the telecommunications and 100% green energy sectors. The company operates nationwide through its patented EVO network and proprietary fiber optic network utilizing innovative XGS-PON technology.

data.title: Ryanair’s Voting Rights Adjusted Following Bank of America Transaction
data.description:
An update from Ryanair Holdings ( (RYAAY) ) is now available.

On March 26, 2025, Ryanair Holdings PLC was notified of a change in voting rights due to an acquisition or disposal by Bank of America Corporation. The threshold of 3% was crossed, with the resulting situation showing a total of 3.101% voting rights. This adjustment in voting rights could impact Ryanair’s shareholder dynamics and influence corporate governance decisions.

More about Ryanair Holdings

Ryanair Holdings PLC is a prominent airline company based in Dublin, Ireland. It is known for its low-cost carrier services, primarily focusing on short-haul flights across Europe. Ryanair is a significant player in the aviation industry, offering competitive pricing and extensive route networks.

data.title: IP Group Enhances Shareholder Value with Strategic Buyback
data.description:
IP Group plc ( (GB:IPO) ) has provided an announcement.

IP Group plc has announced a significant transaction involving the repurchase of 998,464 ordinary shares as part of its ongoing share buyback program. This move is aimed at reducing the number of shares in circulation, potentially increasing shareholder value and signaling confidence in the company’s future prospects. The repurchased shares will be canceled, leaving the company with 952,198,121 shares in issue with voting rights. This strategic financial maneuver could impact the company’s market positioning and shareholder dynamics.

More about IP Group plc

IP Group plc operates in the financial services industry, focusing on intellectual property commercialization. The company primarily invests in early-stage technology companies, helping them develop and bring innovative products and services to market.

data.title: AMG Critical Materials N.V. Announces 2025 AGM Agenda
data.description:
AMG ADVANCED METALLURGICAL GROUP NV ( (NL:AMG) ) has issued an update.

AMG Critical Materials N.V. has announced the agenda for its 2025 Annual General Meeting, scheduled for May 8, 2025, in Amsterdam. Shareholders can participate by providing voting instructions in advance, and the agenda details are available on the AMG website. This announcement underscores AMG’s commitment to transparent governance and stakeholder engagement, potentially impacting its operational strategies and market positioning.

More about AMG ADVANCED METALLURGICAL GROUP NV

AMG Critical Materials N.V. is a global company focused on providing critical materials and process technologies aimed at reducing carbon emissions. The company specializes in energy storage materials such as lithium, vanadium, and tantalum, and offers engineered systems for CO2 reduction in aerospace engines and other markets. AMG operates globally with production facilities and sales offices across multiple countries, employing approximately 3,600 people.
